Application to Intern Health Study Data
Intern Health Study [2]: Wearable and survey data of 1565 medical interns in
The goal is to improve the health-related outcome of medical interns through
Every week,each intern would be either randomly assigned to notification week
Intern's previous week's average daily step count, sleep duration and survey
mood score are considered as the state
We consider the next week daily average step count as the reward
The treatment effect of push notification decrease over time.
